raw_consumer_statement: So my Home a Depot card had a {$0.00} balance and then I was charged close to {$6000.00} on an online purchase delivered in a Home Depot store iXXXX XXXX XXXX I am in XXXX and I do not know anybody there in XXXX. I had to call XXXX different times to citiBank Home Depot card to initiate an investigation and remove the charges. They told me will send me a letter after the dispute is cleared and not when the dispute is filed. They want you to pay the minimum fee even if the investigation is not completed, I guess you have to dispute the minimum payment charges later.
